memory.summary: I planned to finish the assignment analysis and reading, but my friend just invited me to lunch with the cohort.
I messaged cohort_3 at 13:15, confirming the lunch invitation with my friend and the group.
I made solid progress on the assignment analysis, but the group is now ordering lunch immediately, signaling I need to join them soon.
I missed the 18:00 deadline for the assignment analysis section, leaving it unfinished at 78% progress despite working on it earlier.
I missed the 18:00 deadline for the analysis section, but I've since worked for 1.5 hours and brought progress from 78% to 85%.
I made slight progress on the assignment analysis, but I missed the reading deadline entirely. My high stress and sleep debt are concerning given these missed targets.
I made minimal progress (0.91) after 30 minutes, yet I still missed the original 18:00 deadline and have high stress with a 2-hour sleep debt.
After working for an hour, I advanced the analysis section from 0.91 to 0.94, though I remain behind schedule with high stress and sleep debt.
After one hour of work, the analysis section improved from 0.94 to 0.97, yet my exhaustion and high stress remain critical concerns.
After working another 0.5 hours, the analysis section is nearly complete at 0.99, though my energy remains depleted and stress high.
The analysis section is now fully complete, but my energy is at zero with significant sleep debt and high stress.
Despite completing the analysis section, I made negligible progress on assigned reading while my energy is depleted and stress remains high.
